text: Monitor a shared Google Drive folder called "Submissions". When a new file is uploaded, check the file type. If it is a PDF, extract the text and run a plagiarism check against a reference database. If it is a DOCX, convert it to PDF first, then run the same check. Send the plagiarism report to the folder owner via email. If plagiarism exceeds 30%, flag the file by moving it to a subfolder called "Flagged".
